title: Erste Patientinnen und Patienten im Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève | Hirslanden
heading: Erste Patientinnen und Patienten im Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève

breadcrumb.label: Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève

sections.heading: Erste Patientinnen und Patienten im Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève
sections.contentSummary: Page header with breadcrumb navigation, back-link to 'Medienmitteilungen' listing, and H1 title. Rendered inside a .genericHeader component.
Publication date stamp: 'Medienmitteilung vom 28.05.2026'. Displayed as a <time datetime="2026-05-28"> element inside .article-caption. Page type meta is NEWS.

Lead / intro paragraph inside .lead. Summarises the article: CCAG is a public-private partnership between HUG and Hirslanden, the largest outpatient surgery centre in Switzerland, serving ~10,000 patients per year from year one.

Main article body text in grid column 1 (66%). Multiple paragraphs covering: CCAG mission, partnership rationale, building location (Plateau-de-Champel), facility specs (2 800 m², 10 operating theatres), quotes from Robert Mardini (HUG CEO) and Gilles Rufenacht (Hirslanden CEO), standardised processes, OAAT tariff context, surgical specialties served. Includes two bold sub-headings: 'Standardisierte Prozesse' and 'Über das Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève (CCAG)'. Section ends with 'Über die Hirslanden-Gruppe' boilerplate paragraph.

sections.heading: Erste Patientinnen und Patienten im Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève
sections.contentSummary: Sidebar column 2 (33%). Download list (.download section) with a single PDF item: press release PDF (270.36 KB). Icon-driven list item with H4 title and file-size metadata.

First sidebar image: group photo of Pierre Maudet, Gilles Rufenacht, Juliette Lemaignen, Robert Mardini at the CCAG opening. Full-width inside sidebar column. Linkable to full-resolution version on scene7 CDN.
Second sidebar image: exterior/interior view of Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève building. Full-width inside sidebar column.

sections.heading: Kontakt Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève
sections.contentSummary: Contact block for CCAG: Juliette Lemaignen (directrice), email presse@cca-geneve.ch, phone +41 22 522 25 45.

sections.heading: Kontakt HUG
sections.contentSummary: Contact block for HUG press service: email presse-hug@hcuge.ch, phone +41 22 372 37 37.

sections.heading: Kontakt Hirslanden
sections.contentSummary: Contact block for Hirslanden: Oriane Perrin (responsable Marketing et Communication), email medias.geneve@hirslanden.ch, phone +41 22 545 28 48.

templateSpecificComponents.description: Publication date shown as 'Medienmitteilung vom DD.MM.YYYY' above the lead paragraph. Uses <time> element with datetime attribute.
Visually distinct lead / intro paragraph in a .lead wrapper, displayed at larger/bolder weight above the body text. Single paragraph summarising the news.
CSS class .grid-66-33 splits content into a 66% main article column and a 33% sidebar column. Main column: article body. Sidebar: PDF download, images, contact blocks.
Sidebar widget listing downloadable press release PDFs. Each item has a PDF icon, H4 title, and file size label. Links open in a new tab.
Full-width images in sidebar rendered inside a <figure> with <figcaption>. Images are lazy-loaded via Scene7/Dynamic Media CDN with responsive src. Each image is clickable to open full resolution.
Repeating sidebar blocks with bold heading 'Kontakt [Organisation]', contact person name, email (obfuscated in source), and phone number. Three contacts: CCAG, HUG, Hirslanden.
Multi-level breadcrumb <ol> with expandable sub-items per level (sibling pages shown on hover/click). Active item is non-linked. Rendered inside .genericHeader.
templateSpecificComponents.exampleValue: Home > Medien & News > Medienmitteilungen > Centre de Chirurgie Ambulatoire de Genève

templateSpecificComponents.description: Above H1, a back arrow link returning to the parent listing page (Medienmitteilungen). Uses icon-arrow-back icon.

layoutNotes:
Local dev server (localhost:3000) returned 404 for this path — content was fetched directly from the live site (hirslanden.ch). The page uses a two-column layout: 66% main article column + 33% sidebar. The sidebar always appears to the right on desktop. There is no hero image — the article header is text-only (H1 inside .genericHeader). Images appear only in the sidebar. The article body uses multiple .text.section > .textAndImage blocks even for text-only content. Body text includes inline bold headings ( tags inside

) rather than semantic heading elements (H2/H3). The page type is 'NEWS' (from meta itemprop). The page has structured data: NewsArticle and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD. Language switcher offers DE/FR/EN variants of the same article.
